# backend/agentic_adapter/registrar.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-12T10:01:53Z

## Purpose
Register non-agentic routers as System Agents · idempotent · cron-safe.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `typing` import Any
- from `_` import psycopg2
- from `_` import psycopg2.extras
- from `core.config` import get_settings
- from `agentic_adapter.discovery` import discover_all

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `_conn()`: (no docstring)
- `_slug(s)`: (no docstring)
- `register_router_as_agent(mod_info)`: Upsert one System Agent for the router · plus skills per endpoint.
- `run_coverage_loop()`: Discover + register every non-agentic router. Idempotent. Cron-safe.
- `coverage_stats()`: Current coverage · agentic + system agents counted separately.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- 1. Upsert the system agent
- 2. Upsert one skill per endpoint · map to agent
- Risk · Write/Delete are higher · Read is Low
- 3. Map agent → skill
